# Repository Description

## Short Description (GitHub)
Free AI inference router for developers - 21 providers, OpenAI-compatible, no API keys needed

## Topics/Tags
ai, llm, openai, free-ai, ai-api, inference, proxy, router, python, fastapi, docker, gpt4free, groq, gemini, openrouter, self-hosted, developer-tools

## About Section
AI Engine is a free AI inference router that lets developers access 21+ AI providers through a single OpenAI-compatible API. No API keys required for self-hosted providers.

Key Features:
- OpenAI-compatible API
- 21 free providers (6 no-auth, 12 free-tier, 3 self-hosted)
- Automatic failover and load balancing
- Streaming support
- Docker deployment
- 518+ tests
